goal: Build the save_email_attachment agent tool: extract an email's PDF attachment via IMAP and upload it to OneDrive, staged for confirmation (ADR-003) and undoable.
why: The agent reads mail and reads drive files but has no path to carry an attachment from one to the other; this phase builds that bridge — the missing foundation of invoice automation (REQ-26).
success_criteria: readEmail() returns an attachments[] array; downloadAttachment(mailbox, uid, filename) returns the attachment bytes + content-type.
Calling save_email_attachment in the agent loop returns confirmation_required with an action_id and a summary — WITHOUT uploading.
Confirming runs the upload to OneDrive and returns the new itemId/webUrl; an undo deletes the uploaded item.
No regression in existing mail-read or OneDrive-read tools (imap.test.ts + executeConfirmedAction.test.ts green; tsc clean).
The SYSTEM_PROMPT documents save_email_attachment so the agent uses it.

tasks.title: IMAP attachment extraction (downloadAttachment + readEmail attachments[])
acceptance_criteria: readEmail() returns an attachments array; each entry has filename, contentType, and size — and NO content bytes (metadata only).
downloadAttachment(mailbox, folder, uid, filename) returns { filename, contentType, bytes } where bytes is a Uint8Array of the matching attachment.
downloadAttachment throws a readable error when no attachment matches the filename.
No regression: existing imap.test.ts cases still pass.
tasks.action: Add AttachmentInfo + attachments[] to EmailDetail; map parsed.attachments in readEmail (drop content). Add+export downloadAttachment using the same withClient + resolveFolder + read-only download + simpleParser flow, finding the attachment by filename and returning its bytes as Uint8Array. Extend the mailparser mock with an attachments array and add tests for metadata, byte download, and not-found.

tasks.title: save_email_attachment tool definition + DESTRUCTIVE registration + stage path + summary
acceptance_criteria: save_email_attachment is in TOOL_DEFINITIONS with params mailbox (req), uid (req), attachmentFilename (req), folder (opt), targetFolderId (opt), targetFolderPath (opt); description states CONFIRMED BEFORE SAVING and cites Verzonden Facturen/{year}.
executeTool returns status confirmation_required with action_id + summary and performs NO upload.
No sessionPrincipal returns { error: no verified principal in session }.
Missing mailbox/uid/attachmentFilename returns a readable error without staging.
Nonexistent mailbox returns the no-account shape (error + connected_addresses).
tasks.action: Add the tool object to TOOL_DEFINITIONS; add save_email_attachment to the DESTRUCTIVE set; add a stage-time branch in the DESTRUCTIVE block of executeTool (alongside the batch-move branch) that validates args, resolves the account, builds a summary, and calls stagePendingAction with metadata-only args; add a matching summarizeAction case.

tasks.title: Confirm-time execute (upload) + undo (delete) for save_email_attachment
acceptance_criteria: Confirming calls downloadAttachment then uploadFile and returns result { saved, itemId, name, webUrl }.
Destination parent is { itemId } / { path } / {} based on targetFolderId / targetFolderPath / neither.
Missing mailbox/uid/attachmentFilename throws without calling downloadAttachment or uploadFile.
undoAction deletes the uploaded item and moves the row to undone; missing uploadedItemId returns a readable reason.
save_email_attachment is in REVERSIBLE_TOOLS in src/app/page.tsx and src/app/finance/page.tsx.
tasks.action: Add a save_email_attachment case to executeConfirmedAction that downloads the bytes at confirm time and uploads to OneDrive (parent from targetFolderId/targetFolderPath), returning itemId/webUrl and undo_data { uploadedItemId }. Add a save_email_attachment undoAction case that deletes the uploaded item. Add the tool to REVERSIBLE_TOOLS in both UI files. Mock downloadAttachment + uploadFile in the test; assert download then upload, parent resolution, undo_data, and the missing-arg guard.

tasks.title: Document save_email_attachment in the SYSTEM_PROMPT
acceptance_criteria: SYSTEM_PROMPT contains a paragraph naming save_email_attachment, stating it is staged for confirmation and is reversible.
The paragraph tells the model to get attachmentFilename from read_email's attachments list and to pass targetFolderId/targetFolderPath citing the Verzonden Facturen/{year} layout.
tasks.action: Add save_email_attachment to the destructive-tools enumeration sentence and add a new capability block (5e) documenting the read_email then attachments then save_email_attachment flow, the confirm-before-save behavior, reversibility, and the Verzonden Facturen/{year} destination layout.
